title: poa arctica f. vivipara
intro: Poa arctica f. vivipara, also known as viviparous Arctic poa, is a subspecies of the Poa arctica plant, a type of grass that is native to the Arctic regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa arctica f. vivipara are said to include the treatment of digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Poa arctica f. vivipara is typically used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
